chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1807 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.7133/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 05-11-2025 Mr. Abdul Sattar Thaheem, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant PG for the State along with SIP Badaruddin Buriro, SHO PS Mirpur Mathelo >>>>>..<<<<< Learned AAG files statements of Respondents No.2, 3 and 5, which are taken on record. Counsel for the Petitioners submits that the Petitioners are not in contact with him, therefore, he has no instructions. Under the circumstances, since the petitioners are not in attendance, the petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
